author: jGaboardi
text:
Once [`libpysal`101](https://github.com/pysal/libpysal/pull/101) has be merged the following code chunk in `network.PointPatterns` can be condensed from this:

```
if idvariable and from_shp:
    ids = weights.util.get_ids(in_data, idvariable)
elif idvariable and not from_shp:
    ids = list(in_data[idvariable])
else:
    ids = None
```

to this:

```
if idvariable
    ids = weights.util.get_ids(in_data, idvariable)
else:
    ids = None
```
